titleStmt.title: SII 22.281: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 281. (A.R. No. 281 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. RĀJARĀJAKĒSARIVARMAN “who destroyed the ships at Kāndaḷur-Śālai”— RĀJARĀJA I—12th YEAR (A.D. 996-97).

summary.p: This records an agreement given by the sabhā of Śiṟṟūr alias Pṛithivimādēvichaturvēdimaṅgalam (a part) of Tiruvālaṅgāḍu in Paṅgaḷa-nāḍu a division of Maṇaiyiṟkōṭṭam promising to measure out 225 kāḍi of paddy in the temple in the month of Paṅguni every year (as interest) for the 60 kaḻañju of gold received by them from the temple at Tirumālpēṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī .
kān=taḷū
rccālai
kalamaṟutta
kovirājarāja
kecaripanmaṟku
yāṇṭu 10 2- Ā
vatu maṇaiyiṟ
koṭṭattu paṅkala
nāṭṭut tiruvāla
ṅkāṭṭu ṟattu
pritivimahādevi
ccaturvetimaṅ
kalattu sabhaiyom kaiyyeḻuttu tā
markkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭut tirumālp
peṟṟu tribhuvaṉa caṇṭeśvaraṉ kaiyāl yāṅ
kaḷ koṇṭa poṉmutal taṉmakaṭṭaḷaik kallā
l tuṇainiṟai Aṟupatiṉ kaḻañcu Ippoṉ A
ṟupatiṉ kaḻañcuṅ koṇṭa paricāvatu poli
kku policai nelluk kaḻañciṉvāy Āṇṭuvarai
ūrakattu niṉṟār nārācattoṭokkum kālā
l mukkāṭi mukkālum Āka Ippoṉ Aṟupatiṉ kaḻañcukkum
Eṟṟi nellu Irunūṟṟirupattaiṅkāṭiyu māṭṭāṇṭuto
ṟum paṅkuṉit tiṅkaḷ tirumālpeṟuṭaiyār koyili
l tirumuṟṟattukke koṭuvantu yālum
puḻutiyum cettalum nikkit tūyavākki vāṭākūliyu
m cuṅkamum nāṅkaḷe paṭṭum Ūrakattu niṉṟār nārā
cattoṭokkum marakkālāl Iṉṉellu Irunūṟṟiru
pattaiṅkāṭiyum tirumālpeṟṟut tevakanmikaḷvaca
m Aḷantu taravu koḷvomāṉom mun collappaṭṭa
ciṟṟūrākiya prativimāteviccaturvetimaṅkalat
tu sabhaiyom Iṉṉellukkuk kokuṟṟamuṅ ku
ṭikkuṟṟamum Erikkuḻuñ cellātey Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟu
m Emmur Ūrāṇmai ceyvārey Iṉṉellu Irunū
(iṟānū)ṟṟirupattaiṅkāṭiyum Aḷappatākavum Itaṟṟiṟa
mpil dhanmā[ saṉa] ttil
ḷavukku nicatam Iru
kāl kāṇam daṇḍam mide
m muṟcollappaṭṭa pritivimādevi
ccaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom
Ittaṇṭappaṭṭum I
Iṉṉel
ṟṟirupattaiṅkāṭiyum
The rest is too much damaged.
Digital edition of SII 22.281 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
